top_signals.title: Inside the Obama-era Iran nuclear deal that Trump withdrew from
top_signals.summary: The U.S. and Iran have yet to reach a peace deal or address Iran's nuclear ambitions, despite signals from Trump that talks are progressing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Are we at the start of a new investment super-cycle?
top_signals.summary: AI, clean energy and defence spending are reinforcing each other, amplifying potential spend
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Opening remarks by President von der Leyen at the EU-Western Balkans Summit
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Statement Tivat, 05 Jun 2026 Fellow leaders,

top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Public asked to help select UK wildlife to appear on new banknote series
top_signals.summary: The public are being asked to give their views on a selection of wildlife, native to the UK, that will appear on the next series of banknotes in a consultation launched today.

top_signals.title: 'Bring 'em on': Delta wants United's crown over the Pacific, too
top_signals.summary: Delta's president, Peter Carter, told CNBC that the carrier wants to take United on over the Pacific.

top_signals.title: Unpublished anime documents created by Osamu Tezuka found
top_signals.summary: Tezuka laid the foundation for Japan's anime industry by producing numerous popular anime series. He continued to work energetically until the end of his life.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: One in ten graduates to flee UK’s worst job market in 30 years
top_signals.summary: One in ten students due to graduate university this summer do not plan on staying in the UK to find work, according to a new survey from graduate recruitment research firm High Fliers. The survey revealed that out of the 15,000 students surveyed from over 30 universities including Oxford, Cambridge, Edinburgh, and the London School [...]
